---
title: "Principles of Education, drawn from Nature and Revelation and applied to Female Education in the Upper Classes"
---

## Principles of Education, drawn from Nature and Revelation and applied to Female Education in the Upper Classes

**Author:** Elizabeth Missing Sewell
**Date:** 1865
**Imprint:** London: Longman

### Notes

See also [[person:1301]Elizabeth Sewell].

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
